open_gaps: Why do fermions (half-integer spin modes) exist in nature? Division algebra derivation needed. (gap confidence: 0.6)
Proof that Q=2/3 is uniquely stable for N=3 generations (not N=2,4) (gap confidence: 0.7)
Boson sector Koide test - what experimental signature falsifies Q_B=1/3? (gap confidence: 0.4)
Full Propagation Framework derivation of Standard Model particle content (gap confidence: 0.5)

passes.focus: Broad landscape scan — major theoretical approaches, experimental constraints, key players
key_findings: Three generation problem is unsolved mystery in particle physics
LEP confirmed exactly 3 light generations (Nν = 2.984 ± 0.008)
Six major approaches: String/CY (topological), Division Algebra (triality), Topological Insulator (5D), Flavor Symmetry, Anthropic, Preon
Koide formula (Q=2/3) directly relevant — may constrain generation count
Heavy fourth generation (m > 100 GeV) still viable, not excluded
Furey-Hughes 2024 breakthrough on triality → three generations
Kaplan-Sun PRL 2012: 3 generations as topologically protected surface modes

passes.focus: Topological vs Algebraic origins, Koide derivation of N=3, 4th generation exclusion
key_findings: Furey-Hughes (2025): Three generations are the 3 branches of SO(8) triality; 4th generation forbidden.
Bin Li (2025): Koide Q=2/3 derived from topological weights (2 for fermions, 1 for bosons) using Q = 2N/(2N+M).
Varma (2026): Quarks settle on Q=1/2 due to twist order k=2 in orbifold CFT.
LHC 2025: Sequential 4th generation excluded at >5σ by Higgs couplings.
Topological/Algebraic Synthesis: Triality is the permutation symmetry of phase coherence modes in 3D.

passes.focus: Mapping figure-eight graph to triality, Varma quark ratio verification, Derivation from axioms
key_findings: Figure-eight graph zero-modes (b0=1, b1=2) map to SO(8) triality branches (8v vector, 8s/8c spinors).
Empirical confirmation: Varma's quark ratio Rq=1/2 holds for all 6 quarks with k=2, q=1/3 (1/Nc color scaling).
Statistical accuracy: Rq ≈ 0.500455 (0.09% error) using PDG 2024 MS-bar masses at MZ scale.
Lepton Koide ratio (2/3) derived from (2,1) topological weights (4π vs 2π coherence requirement).
Quark ratio (1/2) derived from k=2 twist order and q=1/3 color suppression.

passes.focus: Target three open gaps: k=2 origin, figure-eight→triality mapping, Q-formula derivation
key_findings: k=2 for quarks = twist-2 sector in orbifold CFT (minimal nontrivial twist) — confidence 0.3→0.75
Figure-eight π₁=ℤ*ℤ maps to SO(8) triality via ℤ₂×ℤ₂ center — confidence 0.85→0.9
(2,1) weighting derived from π₁(SO(3))=ℤ₂ topology — confidence 0.8→0.85
q=1/3 confirmed as 1/N_color averaging over color states — confidence 0.9→0.95
